codeReview.summary: Pass. The latest fix closes the remaining blocker from the prior review: `loadDetail` in `src/stores/skillDetailStore.ts:196-216` now resolves `get_skill_detail(...)` first and then loads SKILL.md content with `read_file_by_path(detail.file_path)`, which matches the backend/frontend contract recorded in `.factory/library/claude-source-aware-detail-api.md`. That keeps duplicate Claude detail content bound to the selected observation row instead of collapsing back through `read_skill_content`/`db::get_skill_by_id` in `src-tauri/src/commands/skills.rs:345-370`, so marketplace-only survivors also keep loading content after the user-source row disappears. The same store now preserves the resolved Claude `row_id` for later install/uninstall/refresh reloads via `resolveDetailRequest` and `setActiveDetailRequestFromDetail` in `src/stores/skillDetailStore.ts:57-81`, and the updated regressions in `src/test/skillDetailStore.test.ts:165-187` and `src/test/skillDetailStore.test.ts:333-374` cover both row-path content loading and row-id promotion when the initial caller omitted `rowId`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission still lacks a scriptable native Tauri validation path for duplicate Claude detail switching, so frontend workers fall back to launch/count spot-checks and ad hoc accessibility probing instead of a deterministic row-switch verification flow.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/claude-scan-frontend-worker/SKILL.md` still requires a native Tauri check, but the latest handoff for session `1bb0c87d-93d3-4a80-9108-7a55ed8b66cc` reports only launch/count verification because the macOS webview did not expose automation-friendly hooks. `.factory/services.yaml` provides start/stop/healthcheck for `tauri-dev-isolated`, but no deep-link, fixture route, or automation hook for opening duplicate Claude rows directly.

summary: Pass: the rerun fix now loads detail content from the resolved row path and carries the resolved Claude `row_id` forward for follow-up reloads, so the prior source-aware detail blocker is closed.
